backend/main.mo: Main actor defining user profile management (dealer/company types) with authentication, quotation request system with size info and status tracking, and access control integration using MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: quotation request form component and its integration into the landing page with modal/navigation support.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including pages, components, hooks, and configuration, describing routing, profile management, forms, and styling with earthy OKLCH color system.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining an OKLCH-based color system for light and dark themes, including sidebar, chart, and semantic color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Safa Traders application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for landing, dealer profile, and company profile pages, wrapped in ThemeProvider with global WhatsApp button and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/CompanyProfileSe: Form component for creating company profiles with fields for name, address, and registration number, using React Hook Form patterns and toast notifications for success/error feedback.
frontend/src/components/CompanyProfileVi: Display component showing company profile details (name, address, registration number) with icon-based layout and support contact information card.
frontend/src/components/ContactInfo.tsx: Reusable contact information component displaying two phone numbers and email address with clickable tel/mailto links and icon decorations.
frontend/src/components/DealerProfileSet: Form component for creating a new dealer profile with fields for name, location, and contact number. Handles submission via useSaveDealerProfile mutation and calls onComplete callback on success.
frontend/src/components/DealerProfileVie: Displays a read-only view of dealer profile information including name, location, and contact number with icons. Shows contact email for profile updates.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, contact information, quick navigation links, copyright notice, and caffeine.ai attribution. Organized in a responsive three-column grid layout.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Main navigation header with logo, authentication button, and role-based navigation links for dealer/company profiles. Includes responsive mobile menu and handles login/logout via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Landing page hero section with background image overlay, headline about scrap trading solutions, and call-to-action buttons for dealer and company login.
frontend/src/components/QuotationRequest: Form for submitting dismantling quotation requests with company details, site information, and dynamic size measurements. Validates inputs and submits via useAddQuotationRequest mutation.
Dialog modal wrapper that displays QuotationRequestForm in a popup. Provides customizable trigger button and closes on successful form submission.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: Fixed floating button in bottom-right corner that opens WhatsApp chat with configured phone number. Uses WhatsApp brand color and icon.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state. Invalidates dependent queries when actor changes and initializes access control with admin token.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, providing login/logout functionality, identity management, and authentication status tracking with support for delegation identity validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for backend API calls including fetching user profiles, saving dealer/company profiles, and adding quotation requests with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining an earthy green/brown color scheme for a scrap/recycling industry theme, including light and dark mode variants.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CompanyProfilePage.ts: Company profile page that handles authentication, displays login prompt for unauthenticated users, shows profile setup for new users, and renders company profile view or redirects dealers to their appropriate page.
frontend/src/pages/DealerProfilePage.tsx: Dealer profile page that handles authentication, displays login prompt for unauthenticated users, shows profile setup for new users, and renders dealer profile view or redirects companies to their appropriate page.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero section, services showcase with cards for metal recycling, pickup service, fair pricing, eco-friendly practices, and a quotation request modal.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration for parameter persistence across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, typography settings with Inter and Poppins fonts, container queries, animations, and extended theme utilities for a modern UI design system.
project_state.json: Project metadata for Safa Traders scrap business website defining existing features including dealer/company login systems, WhatsApp integration, contact display, dismantling services showcase, and quotation request forms.
